_rationale: Repo-wide Claude Code harness hooks. These are enforcement rules that must apply to every session (unlike settings.local.json which holds per-host permissions). See .agent/RISKS.md R-0014 for why these exist and what gap they close.

PostToolUse._note: B-0022: UI edit marker. Fires on Edit / Write to web/src/*.jsx. Writes a timestamp file so the Stop hook can check whether a screenshot followed.

PreToolUse._note: B-0026: guard against self-edit of settings.local.json. Claude Code will prompt the user even in auto-approve modes because this hook emits a warning.
PreToolUse.command: echo '⚠  You are editing .agent/settings.local.json (permission allowlist). Confirm with Zhongmin before proceeding — this controls what the agent may run without prompting.' >&2 && exit 0

PreCompact._note: B-0025: snapshot session state to the active initiative's Status.md before compaction so the post-compact model has a fresh pointer even if the implementing agent didn't explicitly run context-handoff.

Stop._note: B-0022: soft UI-verification nudge. If web/src/ was edited this session but no screenshot was captured, print a warning to stderr. Does NOT block.
